markdownRemark.excerpt: If you have any problems with jQuery and SWFObject conflicting, put the SWFObject code in the $(document).ready event handler.
markdownRemark.html: If you have any problems with jQuery and SWFObject conflicting, put the SWFObject code in the $(document).ready event handler.
